title: Understand: plate tectonics
description: Check your understanding of plate tectonics in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.
topic_path: Middle school Earth and space science - NGSS

assessment_items.question_content:
**How do tectonic plates move at divergent boundaries?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They move away from each other.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How do tectonic plates move at convergent boundaries?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They move away from each other.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How do tectonic plates move at transform boundaries?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They move away from each other.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best option for the blank.**

>The age of oceanic crust \_\_\_\_\_\_ with distance from a mid-ocean ridge.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best option for the blank.**

>Relative to oceanic crust near a mid-ocean ridge, oceanic crust near a trench is \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best option for the blank.**

>Oceanic crust near mid-ocean ridges is \_\_\_\_\_\_ than oceanic crust near trenches.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which two statements are evidence for the theory of plate tectonics?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Fossils of the same species are often found on different continents.
Some of the continents seem to fit together like puzzle pieces.
Regions in the middle of continents tend to have similar climates.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which two statements are evidence for the theory of plate tectonics?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Fossils of tropical plants have been discovered in Antarctica.
The coastlines of South America and Africa have complementary shapes.
Temperate climates are found in both Europe and North America.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which two statements are evidence for the theory of plate tectonics?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Similar fossils have been found in both India and Africa.
North America and Europe have complementary coastlines.
All of the Caribbean islands have a hot, tropical climate.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the approximate rate of movement of tectonic plates?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**What is the approximate rate of movement of tectonic plates?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**By approximately how much do tectonic plates move per year?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
